title: Cobblemon Fighters Modpack
description: Ever wanted to play pokemon and minecraft at the same time? With the help of Cobblemon Mod, and a bunch of extra mods and resourcepacks, you can do it right now! For version 1.20.1 of the fabric loader.
body:
# Welcome to the world of Pokemon in Minecraft!
With this modpack, you will be able to play your normal survival minecraft, whilst searching for your favourite pokemon, battling and completing the pokedex!

## So, whats cobblemon fighters anyways?
Cobblemon Fighters is a Cobblemon SMP server where you can adventure your survival minecraft with the added pokemons, and all that comes with them.

## What features does Cobblemon Fighters have to offer?
- +140 cobblemons
- Legendaries
- Mega evolutions
- Pokedex rewards
- GTS
- Both official and player Gyms
- Hunts
- Tournaments
- Pasture block breeding
- Daycare
- Terralith biomes and generation
- Cobblemounts
- Dex ranks
- Claims
We are working on new features, such as safari.

## How do I join?
Its fairly easy, once you download and run the modpack, the server shuold be in the server list already. However, you can join with our IP [CobblemonFighters.minehost.pro](https://modrinth.com/modpack/cobblemonfightersmodpack).

## I have a question...
Don't worry! You can conctact us and interact with other players on the server through our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/WhbgxtaQ7X), or visiting our [Website](https://cobblemonfighters.craftingstore.net/)

## I want to play on my own
The modpack works just fine on a singleplayer world, but remember you will be missing out on half the fun!
